name: иЬЬиЬВзЛЧпЉИBeedog)
description: BeeDog (иЬЬиЬВзЛЧ) comes from a viral Chinese meme вАФ a little dog stung by a bee, with the most adorable and pitiful expression youвАЩve ever seen. ItвАЩs not just a meme вАФ itвАЩs a feeling. BeeDog is about love, joy. And the simple idea: if you like it, just vibe and buy it. What kind of community is BeeDog? BeeDog started its journey on Bonk (SOL) and built a passionate, thriving community for over 3 months. But as we all know вАФ BSC is a better home for Chinese memes. So on October 8th, we officially migrated to BSC. Since the move, BeeDog has broken its previous ATH on SOL and now holds a strong base around $1M market cap. Compared to many new BSC meme projects, BeeDog already has months of solid community building behind it вАФ making it one of the most mature, active, and organic communities on BSC. No bots, no paid shills вАФ just real people, real energy, real vibes.
